assumptions: No ElevenLabs account, API key, or TTS request is assumed.
A terminal with cURL is available; no language SDK is assumed.

developer_goal: Create an ElevenLabs Free account and API key, then receive synthesized audio over HTTPS without installing an SDK.

first_success.outcome: An authenticated cURL POST to https://api.elevenlabs.io/v1/text-to-speech/{voice_id} returns audio bytes (for example written to an mp3 file).
first_success.observable_signal: The HTTP response is successful and the body is playable audio for the requested text.

route_selection.surface: Text to Speech API via cURL (API key + Free-tier credits)
route_selection.rule: Measure documented developer onboarding: account creation through first success. Prefer the vendor quickstart or hosted API/console path when one exists.
route_selection.selected: Text to Speech API via cURL (API key + Free-tier credits)

candidates.name: Text to Speech API via cURL (API key + Free-tier credits)
candidates.reason: ElevenLabs API Authentication documents xi-api-key header auth and a first cURL request. The Create speech API reference documents POST https://api.elevenlabs.io/v1/text-to-speech/{voice_id} returning audio. Billing docs assign Free tier automatically at signup with included credit quota. An SDK install is not required.

required_path.action: Create an ElevenLabs account and verify email if using email signup.
required_path.observable_result: The dashboard and API key settings are reachable.

required_path.action: Confirm Free-tier credits are available (automatic at signup), or purchase Pay As You Go / upgrade if quota is exhausted.
required_path.observable_result: Subscription shows Free tier with remaining credits.

required_path.action: Create an API key in the dashboard and store it securely.
required_path.observable_result: The key value is available locally.

required_path.action: Export the key as ELEVENLABS_API_KEY (or substitute directly into xi-api-key).
required_path.observable_result: The environment variable is set for the current shell.
HTTP 200 with audio bytes for the requested text.

required_path.action: Confirm the response body is playable audio (for example open the saved mp3).
required_path.observable_result: Audio plays or file size is non-zero for the sample text.

prerequisites.description: An ElevenLabs account (email verification for email signup, or OAuth).
Usable Free-tier credit quota (assigned automatically at signup). Paid subscription or Pay As You Go is required only after Free quota is exhausted.
An API key included as xi-api-key on every request.
A terminal with cURL (or any HTTP client). No language SDK is required.

excluded.item: SDK install and speaker playback helpers
Voice cloning and Voice Library workflows
Paid plan upgrades beyond Free first success

sources.title: Billing
evidence_supported: Pay As You Go after exhaustion

uncertainties.question: Exact Free-tier character/credit allotment and commercial-use restrictions for API-generated audio on Free.
uncertainties.impact: May affect how far demos can go before requiring Pay As You Go.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Billing points to the pricing/subscription page for plan tables rather than embedding current Free numbers in the billing article.
